channel.title: Female Tattoo Artist District 12 on Lan Pink Tattoo
channel.description: Recent content in Female Tattoo Artist District 12 on Lan Pink Tattoo

item.title: Vietnam-Inspired Snake Tattoo | Custom Tattoo Design at Lan Pink Ink
item.description:
Vietnam-Inspired Snake Tattoo – A Custom Design for an International Client

This personalized snake tattoo was designed by Lan Pink Tattoo (Lan Pink Ink), a private tattoo studio in Ho Chi Minh City specializing in Fine Line Tattoo, Blackwork Tattoo, and custom tattoo design.

A Special Tattoo Idea Inspired by Vietnam

The owner of this tattoo is an international male client who spent an extended period traveling across Vietnam. During his journey, he experienced the country’s culture, food, landscapes, and the warmth of its people.

item.title: Gonzo Memorial Parrot Tattoo – Custom Tattoo Design at Lan Pink Ink
item.description:
Gonzo Memorial Parrot Tattoo – A Real Story From a Lan Pink Ink Client

Every tattoo carries its own story. For this piece, the story began with a male international client who was traveling in Vietnam and wanted to create a meaningful tattoo in memory of his special companion.

That companion was Gonzo, a Green Cheek Conure who had shared many meaningful moments with him. After Gonzo passed away, the client wanted a wrist tattoo that he could see every day, as a way to keep those memories and that special bond close.
